name: Watercolor Pencil Cleanup
description: Preserves watercolor washes and pencil linework while describing common cleanup goals.
prompt: clean watercolor pencil illustration, preserve paper texture, crisp intentional linework, balanced color washes
negative_prompt: compression artifacts, scanner dust, color banding, muddy edges, oversharpening, plastic texture
notes: Start with light strength for delicate paper grain and faint pencil details.
